items.title: Login - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Authenticate a Twitter/X account and retrieve session cookies for use with interaction endpoints. Rate limited to 60 requests per minute.

items.title: Details - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get detailed information about a specific Twitter community including metadata, member count, and settings.

parameters.name: communityId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter community ID

items.title: Members - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a paginated list of members in a Twitter/X community.

parameters.name: communityId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter community ID

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Search - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Search for Twitter communities by keyword. Returns a list of communities matching the search query with basic information like name, member count, and topic.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query string to find communities

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results

items.title: Tweets - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve tweets from a specific Twitter community. Returns a paginated timeline of community tweets with configurable sorting.

parameters.name: communityId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter community ID

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order for results (Relevance, Recency)

items.title: Search - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Search for tweets, users, or other content on Twitter/X. Supports various search operators and filters.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query string. Supports Twitter search operators.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of search results (Latest, Top, People, Photos, Videos)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Add Member To List - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Add a user to a Twitter list.

items.title: Bookmark - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Add a tweet to your bookmarks for later viewing.

items.title: Conversation - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get messages from a specific DM conversation. Returns conversation details, messages, and user data. Supports pagination with cursor for loading message history.

parameters.name: authToken
parameters.description: Twitter authentication token (auth_token cookie value)

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Conversation ID. For 1-on-1 conversations: 'userId1-userId2' (e.g., '123456789-987654321'). For group conversations: single conversation ID (e.g., '1234567890')

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for loading older messages. Obtained from previous response.

parameters.name: proxy
parameters.description: Optional proxy in format 'host:port@user:pass'

items.title: Create Post - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Post a new tweet to a specific Twitter/X community. Supports text content up to 280 characters for non-premium users, or 25,000 characters for premium users.

items.title: Create Post With Media - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Post a new tweet with media attachments to a specific Twitter/X community. Supports text content up to 280 characters for non-premium users (or 25,000 for premium users) and up to 4 images or 1 video.

items.title: Create Post - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Post a new tweet to Twitter/X. Supports text content up to 280 characters for non-premium users, or 25,000 characters for premium users.

items.title: Create Post Quote - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Quote tweet another tweet with your own commentary. Supports text content up to 280 characters for non-premium users, or 25,000 characters for premium users.

items.title: Create Post With Media - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Post a new tweet with media attachments to Twitter/X. Supports text content up to 280 characters for non-premium users (or 25,000 for premium users) and up to 4 images or 1 video.

items.title: Delete Bookmark - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Remove a tweet from your bookmarks.

items.title: Delete Post - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Delete a tweet posted by the authenticated user.

items.title: Delete Retweet - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Remove a retweet (unretweet) on behalf of an authenticated user. This endpoint allows you to programmatically undo a retweet using the user's authentication token.

items.title: DM Permissions - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Check if you can send direct messages to specific Twitter users. Verifies DM permissions for up to 50 recipient IDs at once.

parameters.name: authToken
parameters.description: Twitter authentication token (auth_token cookie value)

parameters.name: recipientIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of user IDs to check (max 50 IDs, e.g., '123456789,987654321')

parameters.name: proxy
parameters.description: Optional proxy in format 'host:port@user:pass'

items.title: DM User Updates - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Poll for new DM updates and changes. Use the cursor from inbox-initial-state or previous dm-user-updates response to check for new messages, conversations, and updates. Ideal for real-time DM monitoring.

parameters.name: authToken
parameters.description: Twitter authentication token (auth_token cookie value)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Update cursor from inbox-initial-state or previous dm-user-updates response. Required for polling.

parameters.name: proxy
parameters.description: Optional proxy in format 'host:port@user:pass'

items.title: Follow - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Follow a Twitter/X user account.

items.title: Inbox Initial State - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get the initial state of your Twitter DM inbox. Returns conversations, messages, user data, and inbox timeline cursors for pagination. Use the returned cursor for polling updates via dm-user-updates endpoint.

parameters.name: authToken
parameters.description: Twitter authentication token (auth_token cookie value)

parameters.name: proxy
parameters.description: Optional proxy in format 'host:port@user:pass'

items.title: Inbox Trusted - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get paginated trusted conversations timeline. Use the cursor from inbox-initial-state or previous response to fetch next page of trusted DM conversations.

parameters.name: authToken
parameters.description: Twitter authentication token (auth_token cookie value)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Get from inbox-initial-state or previous response.

parameters.name: filterLowQuality
parameters.description: Filter out low quality conversations (default false)

parameters.name: proxy
parameters.description: Optional proxy in format 'host:port@user:pass'

items.title: Inbox Untrusted - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get paginated untrusted/filtered conversations timeline. Use the cursor from inbox-initial-state or previous response to fetch next page of untrusted DM conversations (message requests).

parameters.name: authToken
parameters.description: Twitter authentication token (auth_token cookie value)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Get from inbox-initial-state or previous response.

parameters.name: filterLowQuality
parameters.description: Filter out low quality conversations (default false)

parameters.name: proxy
parameters.description: Optional proxy in format 'host:port@user:pass'

items.title: Join - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Join a Twitter/X community. Returns community details including name, description, member count, and your role after joining.

items.title: Leave - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Leave a Twitter/X community. Returns community details including name, description, and member count after leaving.

items.title: Favorite Post - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Like a tweet on behalf of an authenticated user.

items.title: Notifications - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's notifications timeline on Twitter/X. Returns notifications including likes, retweets, mentions, and follows.

parameters.name: authToken
parameters.description: Twitter authentication token (auth_token cookie value)

parameters.name: timelineType
parameters.description: Type of notifications to retrieve: 'All', 'Verified', or 'Mentions' (default: 'All')

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page (min: 1, max: 100, default: 20)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

parameters.name: proxy
parameters.description: Optional proxy in format 'host:port@user:pass'

items.title: Remove Member From List - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Remove a user from a Twitter list.

items.title: Reply To Post - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Reply to an existing tweet within a Twitter/X community. Creates a reply in the conversation thread with community context. Supports text content up to 280 characters for non-premium users, or 25,000 characters for premium users.

items.title: Reply To Post With Media - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Reply to an existing tweet within a Twitter/X community with media attachments. Creates a reply in the conversation thread with community context and up to 4 images or 1 video. Supports text content up to 280 characters for non-premium users, or 25,000 characters for premium users.

items.title: Reply Post - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Reply to an existing tweet. Creates a tweet in the conversation thread. Supports text content up to 280 characters for non-premium users, or 25,000 characters for premium users.

items.title: Reply Post With Media - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Reply to an existing tweet with media attachments. Creates a tweet in the conversation thread with up to 4 images or 1 video. Supports text content up to 280 characters for non-premium users, or 25,000 characters for premium users.

items.title: Retweet - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retweet a tweet on behalf of an authenticated user. This endpoint allows you to programmatically retweet any public tweet using the user's authentication token.

items.title: Send DM - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Send a direct message to a Twitter user with optional media attachment. Supports images, GIFs, and videos with automatic type detection and processing. Maximum 1 media item per DM.

items.title: Unfollow - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Unfollow a Twitter/X user account.

items.title: Unfavorite Post - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Unlike a tweet on behalf of an authenticated user.

items.title: User Analytics - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get detailed analytics for a user including engagement rates and growth metrics.

parameters.name: authToken
parameters.description: Twitter authentication token (auth_token cookie value)

parameters.name: toTime
parameters.description: End time for analytics period in ISO 8601 format (default: current time)

parameters.name: fromTime
parameters.description: Start time for analytics period in ISO 8601 format (default: 30 days ago)

parameters.name: granularity
parameters.description: Time granularity for metrics: Daily, Weekly, or Monthly (default: Daily)

parameters.name: showVerifiedFollowers
parameters.description: Include verified follower metrics (default: true)

parameters.name: proxy
parameters.description: Optional proxy in format 'host:port@user:pass'

items.title: Details - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get detailed information about a specific Twitter list including metadata, member count, and configuration settings.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter list ID

items.title: Followers - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a paginated list of users following a specific Twitter list. Returns user objects with complete profile information.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter list ID

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Members - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a paginated list of members in a Twitter/X list.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter list ID

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Tweets - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve tweets from a specific Twitter list. Returns a paginated timeline of tweets posted by list members.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter list ID

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: By ID - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve detailed information about a Twitter Space (audio room) by its ID. Returns comprehensive data including title, state, creator, participants, topics, and engagement stats.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description: Unique Space ID (e.g., '1MnxnPmLRQBGO')

items.title: Stream URL - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get the audio stream URL for a Twitter Space. Returns an HLS stream URL that can be used to listen to the Space audio. The mediaKey can be obtained from the Space details endpoint.

parameters.name: mediaKey
parameters.description: Media key of the Space (obtained from the space by-id endpoint's mediaKey field)

items.title: Details & Conversation - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get detailed information about a specific tweet including full metadata, engagement metrics, and conversation context.

parameters.name: tweetId
parameters.description: Unique tweet/post ID

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order for conversation replies (Relevance, Recency, Likes). Default: Relevance

items.title: Details By IDs - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve detailed information for multiple tweets in a single request. Returns comprehensive tweet data including author information, engagement metrics, media attachments, and metadata for up to 200 tweets at once.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tweet IDs to retrieve (maximum 200 IDs per request)

items.title: Quotes - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve quote tweets for a specific tweet. Returns tweets that quote the original tweet with additional commentary.

parameters.name: tweetId
parameters.description: Unique tweet/post ID

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Retweets - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve users who retweeted a specific tweet. Returns a paginated list of retweets with user information.

parameters.name: tweetId
parameters.description: Unique tweet/post ID

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Translate - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Translate tweet text to a target language using Twitter's translation service.

items.title: About Account - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve detailed account information for a Twitter/X user including location, verification details, username history, affiliate relationships, and account creation source.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Twitter/X username without @ symbol (e.g., 'elonmusk')

items.title: By User ID - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve comprehensive user profile information using a Twitter/X user ID. Returns detailed user data including statistics, verification status, and profile metadata.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter/X user ID (e.g., '44196397')

items.title: By User IDs - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve comprehensive user profile information using a Twitter/X user ID. Returns detailed user data including statistics, verification status, and profile metadata.

parameters.name: userIds
parameters.description: Array of Twitter/X user IDs to retrieve

items.title: By Username - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve comprehensive user profile information using a Twitter/X username. Returns detailed user data including statistics, verification status, and profile metadata.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Twitter/X username without @ symbol (e.g., 'elonmusk')

items.title: By Usernames - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve comprehensive user profile information for multiple users in a single request using their Twitter/X usernames. Returns detailed user data including statistics, verification status, and profile metadata for up to 200 users at once.

parameters.name: usernames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of Twitter/X usernames without @ symbol (maximum 200 usernames per request). The @ symbol is automatically stripped if provided.

items.title: Followers - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a paginated list of users following the specified account. Returns user objects with complete profile information.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter/X user ID (e.g., '44196397')

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Followers IDs - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a paginated list of users following the specified account. Returns user objects with complete profile information.

parameters.name: userId

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page (max: 100, default: 20)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Followers (v1) - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a paginated list of users following the specified account. Returns user objects with complete profile information.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter/X user ID (e.g., '44196397')

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page (max: 100, default: 20)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Following - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a paginated list of users that the specified account is following. Returns user objects with complete profile information.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter/X user ID (e.g., '44196397')

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Following IDs - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a paginated list of users that the specified account is following. Returns user objects with complete profile information.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter/X user ID (e.g., '44196397')

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page (max: 100, default: 20)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Following (v1) - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a paginated list of users that the specified account is following. Returns user objects with complete profile information.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter/X user ID (e.g., '44196397')

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page (max: 100, default: 20)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Check Follow - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Check if a follow relationship exists between two Twitter/X users.

parameters.name: subjectId
parameters.description: The user ID of the subject user (the follower)

parameters.name: targetId
parameters.description: The user ID of the target user (the one being followed)

items.title: Subscriptions - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a list of accounts that the user has subscribed to. Includes Twitter Blue subscribers and Super Followers.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter/X user ID (e.g., '44196397')

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Tweets - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve tweets posted by a specific user. Returns a paginated timeline of original tweets (no replies).

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter/X user ID (e.g., '44196397')

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Tweets & Replies - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Retrieve tweets and replies posted by a specific user. Returns a paginated timeline including both original tweets and replies.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter/X user ID (e.g., '44196397')

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Verified Followers - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a paginated list of users following the specified account. Returns user objects with complete profile information.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique Twitter/X user ID (e.g., '44196397')

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results. Obtained from previous response.

items.title: Check Can DM - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Check if users can receive X Chat encrypted DMs. Returns chat permissions including whether they have X Chat enabled and a public key for encryption. Use this endpoint to verify recipients before attempting to send encrypted messages.

items.title: List Conversations - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get a list of all X Chat conversations in your inbox. Returns conversation metadata including participants and timestamps. This endpoint does not require /xchat/setup since it only returns metadata, not decrypted message content.

items.title: Conversation History - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Get decrypted conversation history for an end-to-end encrypted X Chat conversation. Returns messages in decrypted plaintext with metadata. Prerequisite - You must call /xchat/setup first before fetching history.

items.title: Send Message - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Send an end-to-end encrypted direct message via X Chat. Prerequisite - You must call /xchat/setup first before sending messages.

items.title: Setup - TweetAPI Documentation
items.description: Initialize X Chat (encrypted DMs) for your account. This is a required first step before sending encrypted messages. You must have X Chat already set up in the official X app before using this endpoint.
